arts.ttl: Barcelona star reveals he’d love to sign ‘killer’ West Ham player – Clearly a big fan
arts.sum: Barcelona star Marc Andre Ter Stegen has revealed he would love to sign West Ham United’s Niklas Füllkrug for the club. SportBILD have an interview with the goalkeeper today from the “Phrasenmäher” football podcast in which he surprisingly names the West Ham striker as the national teammate he’d love to have at Barcelona. arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund host Barcelona at the Westfalenstadion in the first-leg of the UEFA Champions League quarter-final on Wednesday night. Ranked outsiders to reach the final in Munich, last season’s runners-up…

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund gathering pace ahead of Barcelona and Bayern Munich clashes
arts.sum: Thanks in part to Carney Chukwuemeka's debut goal, the Black-Yellows go into their season-defining matches in Barcelona and Munich as a team in form. It means that Dortmund's first two goals were created and finished by their young guns, with Adeyemi and Beier both being born in 2002 and Chukwuemeka in 2003.
